id: internal UUID in DB for curio
name: Sring Display name of Curio
source: String source name limited to 5 options ['Ancient Magitech', 'Divine', 'Nightmare', 'Prototype Magitech', 'Void']
description: String Description of physical appearance of Curio
effect: String Effect of Curio when used
slots: Positive INT number of inventory slots curio takes up
